ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sub-category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Indicates whether the role has permission for the action (Yes/No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "build_name" TEXT /* Name of the build */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the build */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the build */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the build */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commit that triggered the build */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the build */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_triggered_by FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commit_history ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the deployment occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the deployment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the deployment */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the deployment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_triggered_by FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_logs_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_history" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the commit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the commit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the commit was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client that performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
